issue_title: Bug: "Keep Playing" instead of "Spectate" on second win modal in Teams
issue_body_preview:
When you're killed in a Teams game, the 'win modal' will correctly show a "Spectate" button if you want to keep watching.

But then if your Team wins while you kept watching, the team win modal will have that button labeled as "Keep Playing". It should still be "Spectate" because your player was alr
test_description_zh: 在团队模式游戏中，玩家被击杀后选择旁观（点击"Spectate"按钮），继续观看比赛直到己方队伍获胜。当团队胜利弹窗出现时，观察弹窗中按钮的文字标签。
expected_result_zh: 当玩家已被击杀并处于旁观状态时，队伍胜利弹窗中的按钮应显示为"Spectate"而非"Keep Playing"，因为玩家已经阵亡，只能继续旁观而非继续游戏。
